prestazioni: Engine swap to a **EJ257** (closed-deck, forged internals) with a **Garrett GT35R** turbocharger (82mm compressor, 62mm turbine) and **ID1000** fuel injectors, paired with a **Cobb Tuning Accessport** Stage 3+ map optimized for 93 octane and E85 blends (targeting 400whp at 22psi on a 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust with a **Nameless Performance 3.5-inch catted downpipe**)

Full **IAG Competition Series** engine build: forged **Manley 92.5mm pistons**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, **ACL Race Series bearings**, **Killer B Motorsport oil pump**, and **Cosworth head gaskets** with **Ferrea 5000-series intake/exhaust valves** and **Supertech valve springs/retainers** for 8,500 RPM reliability

Chassis reinforcement with a **Perrin Performance** 25mm rear subframe brace, **Cusco** front strut tower bar, and **Kazama Auto** 3-point rear sway bar (24mm adjustable), paired with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (8-way damping adjustability, 30-way rebound) and **Whiteline** front/rear adjustable control arms for camber correction (-2.5° front, -1.8° rear)
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon Carbon** hood and **VIS Racing** carbon fiber side skirts), extended 50mm in the rear and 40mm in the front for staggered **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 19x10.5 +45 (front) and 19x11 +35 (rear) wheels with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (275/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)

**Seibon Carbon** front splitter with **Aeromotions** 3-stage active rear wing (adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators, 20° for downforce, 5° for drag reduction), paired with **Varis Japan** carbon fiber side mirrors and a **JDM Spec** rear diffuser with integrated **Borla** exhaust tips (dual 4-inch outlets)

**Recaro SP-G** front seats (with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**) and **Sparco Pro 2000** rear seats (retrimmed in **Alcantara with red stitching**), **Defi BF** gauge cluster (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a **JDM Style** A-pillar pod, and **Momo Mod.78** steering wheel with **NRG** quick-release hub
